# Formel

**Summary**: A method used to convert dynamic elastic moduli into static values based on a constitutive model.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2002-elhassan|ElHassan, 2002]] applied FORMEL to calibrate dynamic properties from acoustic logs.
